---
title: "🧪 Logbook"
format: html
---

# 🧬 Bioinformatics Logbook

A living record of bioinformatics experiments, RNA-seq analyses, and machine learning explorations.

---

## 📝 Recent Entries

- [2025-05-23 — Prostate Cancer DEG (GSE6919)](2025-05-23_prostate-limma.qmd)
bulk RNA sequencing (microarray data)** from the GEO dataset **GSE6919** to identify genes that are differentially expressed between **cancerous and healthy prostate tissues**. The analysis was performed using the `limma` package in R, which is well-suited for microarray-based differential expression workflows.
